Allows the user to create new libraries.

scan.description: Allows the user to initiate scans for existing libraries

edit.label: Edit libraries
edit.description: Allows the user to edit basic details for existing libraries

manage.label: Manage libraries
manage.description:
Allows the user to manage advanced settings for existing libraries.
Includes permissions to edit and scan

delete.label: Delete libraries
delete.description:
Allows the user to delete existing libraries.
Includes permissions to edit, manage, and scan

manage.label: Manage server
manage.description:
Allows the user to manage the server.
Includes *many* other permissions

read.label: Read users
read.description: Allows the user to query other users on the server. This is required for some other features, e.g. excluding users from accessing a library

manage.label: Manage users
manage.description:
Allows the user to manage other users on the server.
Includes permissions to create and update

read.label: Access smart list feature
read.description: Allows the user to access smart lists features

validation.ageRestrictionTooLow: Age restriction cannot be less than 0

deleteConfirmation.title: Delete activity
deleteConfirmation.description: All records of login activity will be permanently deleted from the database

server/email.title: Email
server/email.description: Settings related to configuring an SMTP emailer for your Stump server instance

emailers.title: SMTP emailers
emailers.description: The clients you have configured for sending emails from your Stump server instance
emailers.singleInstanceDisclaimer: While Stump supports multiple SMTP configurations in the backend, only one can be configured on the UI. This will be improved in the future

sendHistory.heading: Send history
sendHistory.description: A record of emails sent from this emailer
sendHistory.emptySubtitle: The history of this emailer is empty. It has either not been used or the history has been cleared

devices.title: Email devices
devices.description: The device aliases you have configured for receiving emails from your Stump server instance

name.label: Name
name.description: A friendly name to uniquely identify this device alias

email.label: Email
email.description: The email address this alias will be associated with

forbidden.label: Forbidden
forbidden.description: When enabled, no user may send emails to the address associated with this alias

table.emptySubtitle: Create a new device alias for future use

name.label: Name
name.description: A friendly name to uniquely identify this emailer

smtpSettings.heading: SMTP settings
smtpSettings.description: The SMTP-specific settings for this emailer

smtpProvider.label: SMTP provider preset
smtpProvider.description: The provider of the SMTP server. This is used to prefill some common settings, but doesn't capture all providers

smtpHost.label: SMTP host
smtpHost.description: The hostname of the SMTP server

smtpPort.label: SMTP port
smtpPort.description: The port of the SMTP server

tlsEnabled.label: TLS enabled
tlsEnabled.description: If enabled, the connection to the SMTP server will be encrypted

username.label: Username
username.description: The username for authenticating with the SMTP server. This is typically the email address

password.label: Password
password.description: The password for authenticating with the SMTP server. If you're using Gmail, you may need to generate an app-specific password

senderSettings.heading: Sender settings
senderSettings.description: The settings for the sender of the email

senderDisplayName.label: Sender display name
senderDisplayName.description: The name that will be displayed to recipients

senderEmail.label: Sender email address
senderEmail.description: The email address that will be displayed to recipients

maxAttachmentSize.label: Max attachment size
maxAttachmentSize.description: De maximale grootte, in bytes, die een bijlage mag hebben

testEmailer.recipientDescription: An email address to send the test email to

error.title: Failed to send test email
error.description: Check your SMTP settings and try again

createEmailer.title: Create emailer
createEmailer.description: Maak een nieuwe SMTP-mailer aan voor je Stump-server

updateEmailer.title: Update emailer
updateEmailer.description: Update the details of this SMTP emailer

server/tags.title: Tags
server/tags.description: Create and manage tags for organizing your content

table.title: Tags
table.description: All tags available on this server

empty.title: No tags
empty.action: Create your first tag to get started

modal.heading: Create new tag
modal.description: Tags can be assigned to books, series, and libraries

modal.heading: Rename tag
modal.description: Change the name of this tag across all assigned items

deleteTag.title: Delete tag
deleteTag.description: This tag will be removed from all books, series, and libraries. This cannot be undone.

noLibraries.heading: Hier valt niks te zien
noLibraries.messagePrefix: Je kunt niet zien wat je niet hebt

message.create: Maak een bibliotheek om te beginnen
message.wait: Zodra er bibliotheken zijn aangemaakt, worden ze hier weergegeven

signOutModal.title: Uitloggen
signOutModal.message: Weet je zeker dat je wilt uitloggen?

desktop.message:
Er is een netwerkfout opgetreden die erop wijst dat uw Stump-server momenteel niet beschikbaar is. Zorg ervoor dat deze actief is en toegankelijk vanaf dit apparaat.
Als de URL van uw server is gewijzigd, kunt u deze bijwerken met behulp van het onderstaande formulier.

web.message: Er is een netwerkfout opgetreden die erop wijst dat je Stump-server momenteel niet beschikbaar is. Zorg ervoor dat deze actief is en toegankelijk vanaf dit apparaat.

slidingList.empty: Geen items om weer te geven

uploadImage.emptyState: Een voorbeeld van je afbeelding verschijnt hier
uploadImage.prompt: Drop image here or click to select

common.unimplemented: Deze functionaliteit is nog niet ingebouwd! Kom later terug
common.limitedFunctionality: Dit is nog niet volledig ingebouwd en mist nog wat functies. Kom later terug

fileUpload.someRejected: Some files were rejected. Please check the file types and try again

ACCESS_API_KEYS.label: API keys
ACCESS_API_KEYS.description: Allows the user to manage their own API keys

ACCESS_BOOK_CLUB.description: Allows the user to access book club features, including viewing and joining book clubs

ACCESS_KOREADER_SYNC.label: KoReader sync
ACCESS_KOREADER_SYNC.description: Allows the user to access the KoReader sync integration

ACCESS_SMART_LIST.label: Smart Lists
ACCESS_SMART_LIST.description: Allows the user to access smart list features, including creating and managing smart lists

CREATE_BOOK_CLUB.label: Create book clubs
CREATE_BOOK_CLUB.description: Allows the user to create new book clubs

CREATE_LIBRARY.label: Create libraries
CREATE_LIBRARY.description: Allows the user to create new libraries

CREATE_NOTIFIER.label: Create notifiers
CREATE_NOTIFIER.description: Allows the user to create new notification systems

DELETE_LIBRARY.label: Delete libraries
DELETE_LIBRARY.description: Allows the user to delete existing libraries

DELETE_NOTIFIER.label: Delete notifiers
DELETE_NOTIFIER.description: Allows the user to delete notification systems

DOWNLOAD_FILE.label: Download files
DOWNLOAD_FILE.description: Allows the user to download files from the server

EDIT_LIBRARY.label: Edit libraries
EDIT_LIBRARY.description: Allows the user to modify existing libraries

EMAILER_CREATE.label: Create emailer
EMAILER_CREATE.description: Allows the user to create email configuration

EMAILER_MANAGE.label: Manage emailer
EMAILER_MANAGE.description: Allows the user to manage email configuration and settings

EMAILER_READ.label: Read emailer
EMAILER_READ.description: Allows the user to view email configuration

EMAIL_ARBITRARY_SEND.label: Send arbitrary emails
EMAIL_ARBITRARY_SEND.description: Allows the user to send custom emails to any address

EMAIL_SEND.label: Send emails
EMAIL_SEND.description: Allows the user to send emails through the system

FILE_EXPLORER.label: File explorer
FILE_EXPLORER.description: Allows the user to browse and explore the server filesystem

MANAGE_LIBRARY.label: Manage libraries
MANAGE_LIBRARY.description: Allows the user to manage library settings and configuration

MANAGE_NOTIFIER.label: Manage notifiers
MANAGE_NOTIFIER.description: Allows the user to manage notification system settings

MANAGE_SERVER.label: Manage server
MANAGE_SERVER.description: Allows the user to manage server configuration and settings

MANAGE_USERS.label: Manage users
MANAGE_USERS.description: Allows the user to create, edit, and delete user accounts

READ_JOBS.label: Read jobs
READ_JOBS.description: Allows the user to view system jobs and their status

READ_NOTIFIER.label: Read notifiers
READ_NOTIFIER.description: Allows the user to view notification system configuration

READ_PERSISTED_LOGS.label: Read persisted logs
READ_PERSISTED_LOGS.description: Allows the user to view stored system logs

READ_SYSTEM_LOGS.label: Read system logs
READ_SYSTEM_LOGS.description: Allows the user to view real-time system logs

READ_USERS.label: Read users
READ_USERS.description: Allows the user to view user account information

SCAN_LIBRARY.label: Scan libraries
SCAN_LIBRARY.description: Allows the user to trigger library scans to discover new content

UPLOAD_FILE.label: Upload files
UPLOAD_FILE.description: Allows the user to upload files to the server

MANAGE_JOBS.label: Manage jobs
MANAGE_JOBS.description: Allows the user to manage any queued jobs

EDIT_METADATA.label: Edit metadata
EDIT_METADATA.description: Allows the user to edit metadata for books and series

WRITE_BACK_METADATA.label: Write back metadata
WRITE_BACK_METADATA.description: Allows the user to write metadata changes back to the source files

EDIT_THUMBNAILS.label: Edit thumbnails
EDIT_THUMBNAILS.description: Allows the user to edit thumbnails for books and series
